name: Underwater Blue LED IP68 (Easybuy 4pc)
description: Pack of 4 high-power blue LED marine fixtures rated IP68 for fully submerged installation. Chrome-plated metal eagle-eye body with threaded barrel and lock nut mounts in a 3/4" (19mm) hole through transom, hull, drain-plug adapter, or trim panel. Each fixture exits a sealed grommet with a short red/black pigtail; LED is polarity-sensitive. Runs on 10-14V DC at roughly 250mA per light (~3W). Used as stern lights, underwater courtesy lighting, or transom marker pods.
packageContents: 4x rubber sealing washer / O-ring (factory-fitted on body)

source.sellerTitle: 4pcs/set Blue LED Marine Boats Lights Waterproof IP68 Stern Light Underwater Signal Lamp Yacht Side Marker Courtesy Light Parts
